# CVFolio - AI-Powered Resume & Portfolio Builder

CVFolio is a full-stack web application designed to help users create ATS-friendly resumes and professional portfolio websites. It leverages Google Gemini AI for smart content optimization and portfolio bio generation.

## Codebase Architecture

The project is structured as a monorepo containing two main parts:
- `/client`: React frontend built using Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
- `/server`: Node.js and Express backend with Mongoose/MongoDB for data persistence and a built-in in-memory fallback.

## Documentation Index

- [NOT_FOUND](/docs/errors/not_found.md): Troubleshooting guide for generic 404/Not Found routing errors.
- [RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND](/docs/errors/resource_not_found.md): Details and troubleshooting steps for specific database resource misses (Users, Resumes, Portfolios).

## Key Features

- **Resume Builder**: ATS-friendly templates, custom sections, and automated optimization.
- **Portfolio Builder**: Dynamic portfolio website pages generated from user profiles, complete with custom slugs and themes.
- **Gemini AI Integration**: Real-time resume text optimization and professional portfolio bio generation using `@google/generative-ai`.
- **Image Uploads**: Profile picture and project asset uploads handled via Multer middleware.
- **Flexible Storage**: Seamless database operations using MongoDB/Mongoose with automatic in-memory fallback if no database is connected.

## Directory Structure

```
d:/Resume Maker/
├── client/                     # Frontend Next.js application
│   ├── app/                    # Next.js App Router pages (Home, Resume, Portfolio, Both)
│   ├── components/             # Reusable UI components (Forms, Cards, Logo)
│   └── services/               # API clients, validators, and prompt engineering utilities
├── server/                     # Backend Express.js application
│   ├── config/                 # Database configuration
│   ├── controllers/            # Request handlers (User, Resume, Portfolio, AI, Upload)
│   ├── data/                   # In-memory store fallback logic
│   ├── middleware/             # Validation and error handling middlewares
│   ├── models/                 # Mongoose schemas (User, Resume, Portfolio, Template)
│   └── routes/                 # Express route definitions
└── vercel.json                 # Vercel deployment configuration
```

## API Endpoint Reference

### User Routes
- `POST /api/users` - Create a new user profile
- `GET /api/users/:id` - Fetch user details by ID
- `GET /api/users?email=...` - Find user details by email
- `PUT /api/users/:id` - Update user profile details
- `DELETE /api/users/:id` - Delete a user profile

### Resume Routes
- `POST /api/resumes` - Create a new resume
- `GET /api/resumes/user/:userId` - Fetch all resumes for a specific user
- `GET /api/resumes/:id` - Get resume details by ID
- `PUT /api/resumes/:id` - Update resume content
- `DELETE /api/resumes/:id` - Delete a resume
- `POST /api/resumes/:id/publish` - Mark a resume as published (non-draft)

### Portfolio Routes
- `POST /api/portfolios` - Create a new portfolio page
- `GET /api/portfolios/user/:userId` - Get a user's portfolio configuration
- `GET /api/portfolios/:slug` - Fetch a published portfolio by its slug
- `PUT /api/portfolios/:id` - Update portfolio details
- `DELETE /api/portfolios/:id` - Delete a portfolio
- `POST /api/portfolios/:id/publish` - Make a portfolio page public

### Gemini AI & Upload Routes
- `POST /api/gemini/optimize` - Optimize resume text using Google Gemini
- `POST /api/gemini/portfolio` - Generate professional portfolio content using Google Gemini
- `POST /api/upload/image` - Upload profile image (returns public image URL)
